nasb.text: and an ox and a ram for peace offerings, to sacrifice before the Lord, and a grain offering mixed with oil; for today the Lord will appear to you.’ ”

esv.text: and an ox and a ram for peace offerings, to sacrifice before the Lord, and a grain offering mixed with oil, for today the Lord will appear to you.’”

cnv.text: 又取一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊作平安祭，宰獻在耶和華面前；又取用油調和的素祭，因為今天耶和華要向你們顯現。”

ccb.text: 公牛和公绵羊各一只作平安祭，连同调油的素祭一起献给耶和华，因为今天耶和华要向你们显现。’”
